skills.name: Secret Scanner
skills.description: Scans codebases for hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, and credentials

skills.name: Dependency Auditor
skills.description: Deep scan of npm/pip/go dependencies for CVEs, typosquatting, and malicious packages

skills.name: Prompt Guard
skills.description: Detects and blocks prompt injection attacks targeting AI agents

skills.name: Container Hardener
skills.description: Audits Docker container security — seccomp profiles, capabilities, filesystem permissions

skills.name: Network Monitor
skills.description: Real-time monitoring of agent network traffic with anomaly detection

skills.name: MCP Auditor
skills.description: Scans MCP server configurations for security misconfigurations

skills.name: GitHub Integration
skills.description: Watches GitHub repositories for security events, PR activity, and code changes

skills.name: CI/CD Guardian
skills.description: Monitors CI/CD pipelines for secret exposure, unauthorized workflow changes, OIDC misconfigs

skills.name: Slack Notifier
skills.description: Sends security alerts and agent events to Slack channels

skills.name: PagerDuty Connector
skills.description: Routes critical security events to PagerDuty with auto-escalation

skills.name: Discord Alerter
skills.description: Sends security alerts to Discord channels with embed formatting

skills.name: Teams Connector
skills.description: Sends security alerts to Microsoft Teams via Adaptive Cards

skills.name: Agent Behavior Profiler
skills.description: Builds behavioral baselines per agent type and alerts on deviations

skills.name: Supply Chain Guard
skills.description: Blocks malicious packages at install time — npm, pip, go modules

skills.name: Log Analyzer
skills.description: Parses container logs for anomalies, error patterns, and suspicious activity

skills.name: Auto Patcher
skills.description: Automatically applies security patches for known CVEs with rollback

skills.name: Compliance Reporter
skills.description: Generates compliance reports for SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, EU AI Act

skills.name: Audit Logger
skills.description: Immutable audit logging for all agent actions with tamper detection

skills.name: Firewall Manager
skills.description: Manages agent firewall rules — egress allowlists, port blocking, IP filtering

skills.name: Backup Manager
skills.description: Encrypted backups of agent state and configurations to R2 storage

skills.name: Credential Rotator
skills.description: Automatic rotation of agent credentials on schedule or breach detection
